/usr/bin/ar qc libcppcoro_static_thread_pool.a CMakeFiles/cppcoro_static_thread_pool.dir/third_party/cppcoro/lib/auto_reset_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppcoro_static_thread_pool.dir/third_party/cppcoro/lib/lightweight_manual_reset_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppcoro_static_thread_pool.dir/third_party/cppcoro/lib/spin_mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppcoro_static_thread_pool.dir/third_party/cppcoro/lib/spin_wait.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppcoro_static_thread_pool.dir/third_party/cppcoro/lib/static_thread_pool.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcppcoro_static_thread_pool.a
